steps.title: Use Diego's stated hope
steps.content: The text directly says Diego hoped not only to meet the sisters but also to make the acquaintance of their poet father. His reason for accompanying Rafael is built around those introductions.

steps.title: Reject invented motives
steps.content: A attributes the narrator's learning situation to Diego, B invents a request for mentorship, and C invents a plan to recite poems. The supported statement is that Diego expected to be introduced to both the sisters and their father. The answer is D.
